I know.

Right.
Yeah.

Does that get much use?
No.

And so.

I get it.

So I was like, okay.
Yep.
Yeah.
But now my new, my new passion is paddle.
Have you heard of paddle?
No.

So it creates kind of like a, it's like almost like 3D chess.
It's a lot of fun.
Yes.
It's squash tennis hybrid.
Ooh, fun.
Hey, William, we've got another team member who's going to be joining us going forward.
So Zach is part of the team at Turnstile and Zach comes from the space that we're in.
And he's been in the space for quite a long time.
And so I'm going to be pulling him in to help review content because I'm not an expert.
Like, I'm learning, but I'm not an expert.
And Jordan's getting a little busy and getting pulled into some other things.
And so I'm pulling Zach in.
So I think he's going to largely kind of listen today, just like understand, you know, what it is that we're doing.
I didn't give him any preview on who GrowthX is or how it works or anything.
I did share that I think it was the content OS Airtable doc, so he could take a look at the themes and the topics.
So I think, Zach, that's probably all the context that you have at this point, right?
Yes, that's correct, Seema.
So let me give you like the 60 seconds on this so that you can understand a little bit better.
So GrowthX is an agency that leverages AI and very detailed processes to build content to help us increase our visibility to search engines and LLMs, mostly like the primary focus is LLMs.
And they've been doing this for a while.
They do this for a lot of really well-known companies.
And basically, they kind of look at, like, what are the topic areas that we want to be ranking for?
What are the types of, like, questions we want to be ranking for?
And then how do our competitors rank for those areas today?
And then they look at, like, where's the white space?
And then how do we go create content that's going to be digested by the LLMs so that we get cited?
And, you know, yes, the audience is humans, but the audience really is also LLMs.
That's a big focus.
And we've been working, I think we're now at, like, week six of our engagements.
It's a year-long engagement.
The first two months are, like, what they call a strategy sprint, where it's all about them getting to know our business and our target ideal customer profile.
There's a lot of calibration.
And then once we get to the end of eight weeks, we should be in a mode where we're publishing a new blog every single day.
So that's the, like, quick and dirty on kind of what we're doing here.
And originally, I had Jordan pretty involved, and he was kind of my domain expert helping with.
content.
But, you know, as I shared with you, he's getting pulled into some other things.
And so I'd love for you to take that spot so we don't have to bug him so much.
Got it.
That makes sense.
Cool.
Great to meet you all.
I'm going to mostly listen for today.
And then, yeah, happy to, I just don't know exactly where things are at.
We can give a download of, like, some industry stuff, if that's helpful, or, like, it can be more tactical with looking at the actual content as it's developed.

Awesome.

think, you know, hopefully you got to take a look at that.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, introduce a new reviewer, and demo the analytics dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Reviewer:** Zach Weinstein replaces Jordan Zamir as the domain expert for content review, leveraging deep industry experience to ensure accuracy and quality.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**Production Delay:** Content production is behind schedule due to a system calibration issue. Three revised articles will be delivered EOD today, with the full seven-article batch expected this week.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [**Analytics Dashboard Ready:** The Looker dashboard is live, combining GA4 and GSC data to track organic search and LLM referral traffic, providing real-time performance insights.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [**CMS Training:** Mat Rider provided a CMS walkthrough to ensure GrowthX can correctly apply categories and images, which are critical for site navigation and visual consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Review

  - [**Production Status:** Content production is behind schedule due to a system calibration issue.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Goal:** Deliver three revised articles EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [**Plan:** After approval, publish the full seven-article batch this week and start the next batch of five.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [**New Reviewer:** Zach Weinstein is the new domain expert for content review.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Zach's deep industry experience ensures content accuracy and quality.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [**Onboarding:** Zach has the Content OS Airtable doc and will receive core artifacts (Turnstile profile, ICP, products) for context.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [**Image Updates:** New article images feature a light style, relevant illustrations, and the requested yellow brand color.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)

### CMS Walkthrough

  - [Mat Rider provided a CMS walkthrough to ensure correct formatting and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Key Fields:**](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [**Header Image:** The first image in the body becomes the header.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [**Thumbnail Image:** A dedicated field at the bottom sets the thumbnail for the blog homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**Author:** Select the author (currently Jordan Zamir).](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [**Category:** Select the topic cluster, which drives site navigation.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**Verification:** Use the preview icon to check formatting before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Analytics Dashboard

  - [Aida Knezevic demoed the new Looker dashboard, which combines GA4 and GSC data.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [**Key Reports:**](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**GA4 Overview:** Tracks sessions, engaged sessions (\>10s or interaction), and traffic sources.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Non-Branded Report:** Shows organic search performance from non-branded keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Cohorts Report:** Measures performance of GrowthX-published content by topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
      - [**LLM Referral Traffic:** Tracks visits from LLMs (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini).](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
          - [**Note:** Claude has low referral traffic because it rarely cites sources without explicit prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [**Conversion Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**Requirement:** To track specific funnels (e.g., "Sign Up" vs. "Book Demo"), separate conversion events must be set up in GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [**Alternative:** Use GA4 exploration reports to map user journeys from blog posts to conversion pages.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [Deliver three revised articles EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [Send email invites to the Looker dashboard (include Zach Weinstein).](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [Add the dashboard link to Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [**Turnstile:**](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Update Jordan Zamir's profile photo in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Define and implement separate GA4 conversion events for key funnels.](https://fathom.video/share/QgTzy6DyxA7f_tNiykj6mEBPUa1JoCYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
